common.clearSearchHint: Clears the current search and keeps the search field ready for more input.
common.scrollToTopHint: Moves the list back to the first item.
common.scrollToTopInProgressHint: The list is already returning to the first item.

onboarding.dragHint: Drag the light or tap to continue

awaken.title: Get Isle ready for your work
awaken.body: Set your defaults in about a minute. You can change them later in Settings.

signals.local: Chats, knowledge, and preferences stay local-first
signals.private: Keys are used only for the providers you configure
signals.ready: After setup, you return Home ready to type

privacy.title: Important data stays under your control
privacy.body: IsleMind keeps major capabilities separately configurable so you can enable them one by one.

key.title: Provider keys
key.body: Used only for the model endpoints you choose.

knowledge.title: Knowledge and memory
knowledge.body: Enable, delete, or re-index them independently.

companion.title: Choose Isle's default tone
companion.body: This shapes the first chat tendency without limiting later instructions.

concise.title: Concise
concise.body: Prioritizes short answers, conclusions, and executable steps.

research.title: Research
research.body: Focuses on context, sources, evidence, and multiple angles.

creative.title: Creative
creative.body: Useful for writing, naming, brainstorming, and divergent options.

engineering.title: Engineering
engineering.body: Leans toward code, architecture, debugging, and verifiable implementation paths.

companion.title: Companion
companion.body: A softer tone for organizing thoughts and ongoing conversation.

capability.title: Enable extensions as needed
capability.body: Search, knowledge, memory, and skills can each be enabled independently.
capability.providerLater: No provider yet is fine. Configure one later from the top bar or Settings.

knowledge.title: Local knowledge
knowledge.body: Import material and cite it in answers.

search.title: Web search
search.body: Connect search only when fresh information is needed.

skills.title: Skill
skills.body: Use preset capabilities for specialized work.

firstPrompt.title: Start with one question
firstPrompt.body: Choose a sample, or finish and type your own.

samples.concise:
Turn my three tasks for today into the shortest executable work artifact.

Input:
- Tasks:
- Available time:
- Must avoid:

Output must include these exact section headings:
1. Structured summary
2. Decision log
3. Action items (owner / next step / deadline or trigger)
4. Risks and blockers
5. Open questions
6. Evidence still needed
7. A short version I can copy to someone else
samples.research:
Help me compare two options and list the key evidence I need to verify.

Input:
- Option A:
- Option B:

Output must include these exact section headings:
1. Structured summary
2. Decision log
3. Action items (owner / next step / deadline or trigger)
4. Risks and blockers
5. Open questions
6. Evidence still needed
7. A short version that can be sent to collaborators
samples.creative:
Generate naming directions for a private AI workspace.

Input:
- Mood: warm, restrained, reliable
- Avoid: exaggerated or marketing-heavy names

Output must include these exact section headings:
1. Structured summary
2. Decision log
3. Action items (owner / next step / deadline or trigger)
4. Risks and blockers
5. Open questions
6. Evidence still needed
7. A short version that can be sent to collaborators
samples.engineering:
Break a complex feature into verifiable development steps.

Input:
- Feature goal:
- Current constraints:

Output must include these exact section headings:
1. Structured summary
2. Decision log
3. Action items (owner / next step / deadline or trigger)
4. Risks and blockers
5. Open questions
6. Evidence still needed (Verification command or evidence for each step)
7. A short version that can be sent to collaborators
samples.companion:
Help me untangle what I am stuck on and suggest the next step.

Input:
- What is stuck:
- What I have tried:

Output must include these exact section headings:
1. Structured summary
2. Decision log
3. Action items (owner / next step / deadline or trigger)
4. Risks and blockers
5. Open questions
6. Evidence still needed
7. A short version that can be sent to collaborators
samples.organize:
Organize the following ideas into an executable structure.

Input:


Output must include these exact section headings:
1. Structured summary
2. Decision log
3. Action items (owner / next step / deadline or trigger)
4. Risks and blockers
5. Open questions
6. Evidence still needed
7. A version I can copy to someone else
samples.plan:
Make a lightweight but executable plan for the next week.

Input:
- Weekly goal:
- Time limits:

Output must include these exact section headings:
1. Structured summary
2. Decision log
3. Action items (owner / next step / deadline or trigger)
4. Risks and blockers
5. Open questions
6. Evidence still needed
7. A short version that can be sent to collaborators

chat.attachImageAccessibilityHint: Opens the image picker and attaches the selected image.
chat.attachFileAccessibilityHint: Opens the file picker and attaches the selected file.
chat.attachCameraAccessibilityHint: Opens the camera and attaches the captured photo.
chat.expandQuickToolsAccessibilityHint: Shows quick model, reasoning, prompt, output, and tool controls.
chat.quickModelAccessibilityHint: Opens quick model choices for this chat.
chat.quickReasoningAccessibilityHint: Opens reasoning effort choices for this chat.
chat.quickReasoningCycleAccessibilityHint: Cycles reasoning effort for this chat, including the default level.
chat.quickReasoningUnavailableAccessibilityHi: The current model does not support manual reasoning effort.
chat.quickPromptAccessibilityHint: Opens the system prompt editor for this chat.
chat.quickOutputAccessibilityHint: Toggles between automatic reply output and work artifact output.
chat.noQuickModelMatches: No available models in this family.
chat.advancedModelMenuAccessibilityHint: Opens the full provider and model setup menu.
chat.openCommandPanelAccessibilityHint: Inserts a slash command marker in the message input.
chat.modelPickerSubtitle: Search or switch the provider and model for this chat
chat.closeModelMenuHint: Dismisses the model and chat-parameter menu.
chat.systemPromptAccessibilityHint: Edits the instruction used by this chat.
chat.systemPromptPlaceholder: Set the AI's role and behavior...
chat.maxTokensAccessibilityHint: Enter an output token limit from 128 to {{limit}}.

chat.sendMessageUnavailableAccessibilityHint: This chat cannot send right now. Check provider or model settings first.

chat.keepTypingAccessibilityHint: Keeps the current streaming response running while you continue typing.

chat.attachmentReadFailed: Could not read this attachment. Try another file.

chat.collapseAttachmentsAccessibilityHint: Hides the attachment, voice, command, and knowledge tools.
chat.expandAttachmentsAccessibilityHint: Shows the attachment, voice, command, and knowledge tools.
chat.voiceInputAccessibilityHint: Starts voice recording for this message.

chat.searchProviderOrModelAccessibilityHint: Filters the providers and models available for this chat.

chat.clearSystemPromptAccessibilityHint: Removes the current system prompt from this chat.
chat.noProviderModelMatchesDescription: Clear search, or enter a provider or model name.
chat.providerNoModels: This provider has no available models.
chat.providerNoModelsSyncHint: This provider has no available models. Go to Providers to sync and test.
chat.modelSwitchNote: Only this conversation changes when you switch here; other chats are left untouched.
chat.systemPromptExample: Example: You are a concise, reliable mobile assistant.
chat.copyConversationLinkHint: Copies a shareable link for this chat.
chat.reasoningEffortAccessibilityHint: Sets reasoning effort to {{value}} for this chat.
chat.reasoningUnsupported: The current model does not expose manual reasoning effort settings. It may still return thinking output.
chat.reasoningCostHint: Deep reasoning may use more tokens and increase wait time.
chat.configureProvidersAccessibilityHint: Opens provider settings so chat can be configured.

chat.syncModelsBeforeChat: Sync models first, or add an available model manually.

chat.importKnowledgeAccessibilityHint: Opens the knowledge import flow for this chat.

chat.sendFailedMessage: The message was not sent. Try again later.
chat.interruptedSendFailedMessage: The interrupt message was not sent.
chat.switchModelMessage: Only this chat changes. Any active response will stop before switching.

app.pageUnavailableMessage: Retry this page or go back to continue.

renderGuard.compactTitle: Content cannot be rendered right now
renderGuard.description: Retry rendering or copy the raw text to continue.

source.cannotOpenMessage: The system browser cannot open this link.
source.previewUnavailableMessage: This page blocked embedded preview or the network cannot load it. You can still open it in the system browser.
source.noSourceMessage: This message has no source record to open.
source.noProcessMessage: This message has no retrieval, search, or tool process record.

messageContent.diagramFallback: This version keeps diagrams readable and copyable without faking unavailable rendering.
messageContent.copyBlockHint: Copies this full block to the clipboard.
messageContent.diagramPreviewHidden: {{nodes}} more nodes and {{edges}} more links outside this preview.

messageBubble.androidPendingDirectoryAccessSummary: IsleMind will open the Android directory picker. Access stays limited to the folder you select, raw storage paths are blocked, and full-phone storage permission is not used.
messageBubble.androidPendingApplyFilesTitle: Review and apply Android file changes
messageBubble.androidPendingApplyFilesSummary: Applies {{count}} user-authorized SAF file operation(s). Delete operations are refused, raw filesystem paths are blocked, and successful move operations can return undo operations.
messageBubble.androidPendingUndoFilesSummary: Applies {{count}} saved undo operation(s) inside the user-authorized SAF tree. Delete operations remain unsupported.
messageBubble.androidPendingApkInstallerSummary: IsleMind can only hand the APK to the Android system installer. The system installer requires your confirmation; silent install is unsupported.
messageBubble.androidPendingClearCacheSummary: Only IsleMind app-cache entries are eligible. User files, arbitrary shared storage cleanup, and full-phone cleaning are unsupported.
messageBubble.androidPendingAlarmSummary: IsleMind opens the Android Clock UI with the requested alarm fields. The alarm is created only after you confirm it in the system app.
messageBubble.androidPendingCalendarSummary: IsleMind opens the Android Calendar UI with the requested entry fields. The reminder or event is created only after you confirm it in the system app.
messageBubble.copyProcessTraceEmpty: No visible process trace to copy.
messageBubble.saveAgentWorkflowMessage: The workflow will appear in Skills > Agent workflows and can be edited or disabled.
messageBubble.deleteConfirmMessage: The message is deleted only after you confirm.

error.credential_mismatch: Key type and endpoint do not match

errorDescription.missing_key: Save the current provider key, then return here and retry.
errorDescription.disabled_provider: Enable the current provider in settings or switch to another available provider.
errorDescription.credential_mismatch: For example, MiMo tp- keys must use the Token Plan endpoint, while sk- keys must use the metered endpoint.
errorDescription.bad_auth: Save the key again and test it to confirm permissions.
errorDescription.bad_base_url: If you use a proxy or Token Plan, confirm the Base URL includes /v1.
errorDescription.model_unavailable: Sync available models and choose one your account can use.
errorDescription.network_error: Check network, proxy, and provider status, then retry.
errorDescription.timeout: The request waited too long. Check network, proxy, or Base URL.
errorDescription.rate_limited: Retry later, or check provider subscription, balance, and rate limits.
errorDescription.max_tokens_exceeded: Lower Max Tokens in chat options or switch to a model with a larger output limit.
errorDescription.default: Test the current model or open settings to inspect provider configuration.

conversation.openFirstSearchResultNoMatchHint: Reports that no chat matches this search and keeps the search field ready.
conversation.openFirstSearchResultWaitingHint: Wait until the search results finish updating.
conversation.noConversations:
No conversations yet
Tap + to start

conversation.noSearchSubmitFeedback: No chats match "{{query}}". Edit the search, or clear it to show the full history and keep typing.
conversation.interactionPausedMessage: Tap again after scrolling or search results finish updating.
conversation.deleteAccessibilityHint: Opens a delete confirmation for this chat.
conversation.openAccessibilityHint: Opens this chat. Long press to rename it.
conversation.cancelRenameAccessibilityHint: Cancels editing and restores the current title.
conversation.scrollToCurrentHint: Moves the list to the active chat.

settings.title: Settings
settings.themeIslandDescription: Legacy island theme alias. Uses the cartoon family.
settings.themeMinimalDescription: Focused workspace visuals with quiet backgrounds, fine borders, and higher information density
settings.themeGlassDescription: Light system-material chrome with restrained translucent surfaces and plain content areas
settings.themeCartoonDescription: Warm rounded controls, pill chips, thicker touch borders, and soft playful feedback
settings.clearDataConfirm: This will permanently delete all conversations and settings. Continue?
settings.systemStatusNotificationsDescription: Shows active generation in Android notifications. Supported systems may promote it into a top capsule. Notifications present status only and do not guarantee background generation or reply delivery.
settings.systemStatusNotificationsStatusChecking: Reading this device's system notification capability. Notifications do not guarantee background generation.
settings.systemStatusNotificationsStatusUnavailab: System notifications are unavailable here. The in-app top bar still shows status; background generation is not guaranteed.
settings.systemStatusNotificationsStatusNativeErr: System notification capability cannot be read right now. The in-app top bar still shows status; background generation is not guaranteed.
settings.systemStatusNotificationsStatusPermissio: Notification permission is not granted. Enable it to show standard status notifications; background generation is not guaranteed.
settings.systemStatusNotificationsStatusStandardO: Standard Android notifications are available. This system does not support top-capsule promotion, and background generation still depends on the system keeping the app process alive.
settings.systemStatusNotificationsStatusPromotedR: Standard notifications are available and can request system top-capsule promotion. Background generation still depends on the system keeping the app process alive.
settings.systemStatusNotificationsStatusPromotedB: Standard notifications are available. The system currently blocks top-capsule promotion, and background generation still depends on the system keeping the app process alive.
settings.systemStatusNotificationsStatusPromotedU: Standard notifications are available. Top-capsule promotion state cannot be read yet, and background generation still depends on the system keeping the app process alive.
settings.systemStatusNotificationsPermissionMessa: IsleMind needs notification permission to show generation progress and tappable chat status. Notifications do not make background generation reliable.
settings.systemStatusNotificationsUnavailable: System status notifications are not supported on this platform
settings.systemStatusNotificationsPermissionDenie: The top bar will still show status inside the app. You can enable notifications later in system settings. Android and vendor policy decide whether generation continues in the background.
settings.systemStatusNotificationsSettingsUnavail: Notification settings could not be opened
Open IsleMind notification permission from Android system settings.
settings.systemStatusNotificationsPromotedSetting: This Android version does not support top-capsule promotion permission settings.
settings.importExportDescription: Exports include full IsleMind data and mem0-compatible memories. Imports accept IsleMind JSON and mem0 memories/results JSON.
settings.upstreamGovernanceSubtitle: Controls model request transport, compact, proxy, logs, and access rules.
settings.runtimeDiagnosticsSubtitle: Shows transport, compact, proxy, log, policy, and provider health.
settings.runtimeDiagnosticCompactValue: {{mode}} · ready {{ready}}/{{capable}} · remote {{remote}} · local {{local}} · fallback {{fallback}} · saved {{saved}} · local saved {{localSaved}} · ratio {{localRatio}} · reasons {{fallbackReasons}}
settings.runtimeDiagnosticProviderSupportValue: full {{full}} · partial {{partial}} · planned {{planned}} · hosted gaps {{hosted}} · model-list exceptions {{modelList}}
settings.runtimeDiagnosticProviderContractValue: ready {{ready}} · mapped {{mapped}} · live {{live}} · references {{reference}} · gates {{gates}} · logged {{logged}}
settings.policySummaryNote: Built-in rules check empty messages, oversized payloads, inline attachments, and message count. Blocklists override allowlists.
settings.remoteCompactThresholdNote: Default 0.8; local auto compact triggers when input tokens exceed the model budget ratio.
settings.remoteCompactThresholdTokensNote: Default 200000; official Responses compaction threshold is an absolute token limit.
settings.compactExecutionPolicyNote: Auto mode evaluates remote compact against the full context first. When it does not trigger or the provider does not declare support, local long-context compression keeps recent messages and summarizes older history. Required mode blocks the request when provider support is missing.
settings.proxyBaseUrlNote: Custom URL keeps the original endpoint path and query string.
settings.modelTestModelNote: Empty value uses the first synced available model.
settings.runtimeLogMaxBytesNote: Values below 4096 are treated as 4096; rotation keeps newest lines.
settings.listRuleNote: One per line or comma-separated; * wildcard is supported.
settings.blocklistNote: Blocklist wins over allowlist; one per line or comma-separated.
settings.importDoneMessage: Chats and settings were restored from JSON.
settings.importMem0DoneMessage: {{count}} mem0 memories were imported into long-term memory review. They will not enter chat retrieval until approved.
settings.importSkippedMessage: No file was selected, or the JSON structure is invalid.
settings.resetSettingsConfirm: Reset settings and delete API keys?
settings.updateRetryNotSuppressed: This failure did not update the last-check time, so you can retry immediately.

preferences.generationSubtitle: Defaults for new chats; each chat can still override them.
preferences.agentWorkflowSubtitle: Visible limits for bounded tool use. Background continuation stays off.
preferences.agentWorkflowReadOnlyToolsDescription: Allows retrieval, search, and inspection tools inside a traced run.
preferences.agentWorkflowVisibleWritesDescription: Allows write tools only when the planned action is visible.
preferences.agentWorkflowDestructiveConfirmDescripti: Destructive tools must require explicit confirmation or stay blocked.

skills.name: Name
skills.descriptionPlaceholder: Task scope or constraints for this Skill
skills.promptPlaceholder: Write the Skill system prompt. {{variable}} is supported.
skills.firstUserMessagePlaceholder: Optional first user message inserted when this Skill is applied
skills.expectedReplyFormatPlaceholder: For example: conclusion first, then risks and verification steps.
skills.variablesJsonNote: Must be a SkillVariable JSON array, for example [{"name":"topic","type":"text"}].
skills.variablesInvalid: Variables JSON must be an array.
skills.listFieldNote: Separate items by line or comma. MCP tools can use serverId:toolName.
skills.workflowImportedReviewRequiredMessage: {{name}} stays disabled until you review and enable it in Agent workflows.
skills.fillVariablesMessage: These values are inserted into the system prompt when the Skill is applied. Blank values remain blank.
skills.defaultChinesePrompt: Answer in Simplified Chinese by default. Keep structure clear and start with actionable conclusions.
skills.createDefaultDescription: Create and apply a Chinese output Skill
skills.importInvalidFormat: The Skill file format is invalid.
skills.workflowTemplatesSubtitle: Built-in workflows require visible approval before they are saved.
skills.agentWorkflowsSubtitle: Visible workflows can be edited, exported, disabled, and re-enabled.
skills.workflowReviewRequiredNote: Imported workflow; review locally before enabling.
skills.reviewAgentWorkflowMessage: {{name}} was imported and stays disabled until you approve it locally.
skills.disableAgentWorkflowMessage: {{name}} will be hidden from chat commands.

mcp.addServerSubtitle: Only explicit user-configured HTTP/SSE addresses are allowed.

providerSettings.addedMessage: {{name}} is disabled by default and moved to the top.

providerSettings.importDoneMessage: {{count}} providers imported and disabled by default.
providerSettings.enableImportedMessage: Enable the {{count}} providers imported in this batch? IsleMind will fetch models and test available models in parallel, and ready providers can be used first.
providerSettings.activationStartedMessage: {{count}} providers will run in parallel, up to {{concurrency}} at a time. Ready providers can be used first.
providerSettings.activationFailed: Enable failed or no models available
providerSettings.clearAllMessage: Delete all {{count}} providers and their saved tokens. This cannot be undone.
providerSettings.manualSortRequired: Switched to manual sort. You can adjust the order now.

providerSettings.sortedViewHint: Viewing by {{label}}. Switch to manual to adjust provider order.
providerSettings.dragProviderHint: Long-press, drag up or down, then release to save the order.
providerSettings.dragDisabledHint: Switch to manual sort to adjust provider order.
providerSettings.addSubtitle: Saved providers stay disabled until you enable them.
providerSettings.name: Name
providerSettings.tokensNote: Paste one or more tokens, separated by lines or commas.
providerSettings.modelsNote: Leave blank to fetch available models when enabling or syncing and testing, or enter one model ID per line.
providerSettings.clipboardPermissionMessage: Approve the system prompt to read clipboard text.
providerSettings.clipboardNoConfig: Clipboard text added. No connection config detected yet.
providerSettings.fileUnsupportedMessage: Choose a txt, csv, or json file.
providerSettings.importSubtitle: Read from clipboard or a file, or paste content directly.
providerSettings.importNote: Supports text, clipboard, txt, csv, json, and NewAPI connection config JSON.
providerSettings.importAppliedFirst: {{count}} connection config(s) detected. The first one was applied.

protocol.title: Interface protocol
protocol.endpointNote: Token Plan can use /v1 or /anthropic. Anthropic-compatible requests automatically append /v1/messages when sending.

providerActivation.summary: {{target}} targeted · {{enabled}} enabled · {{synced}} synced · {{tested}} tests passed · {{noModels}} no models · {{failed}} failed

apiKeyPanel.enterTokensFirst: Enter one or more tokens first.
apiKeyPanel.pendingGroupsAdded: {{count}} token groups added. Save to apply.
apiKeyPanel.fetchAndTestNeedsCheck: Fetch models and test needs check
apiKeyPanel.groupsSynced: Token groups synced and model list merged.
apiKeyPanel.deleteProviderMessage: {{name}} will be removed from provider settings. Saved tokens for this provider will be deleted.
apiKeyPanel.actionHelp: Apply detection uses the suggested protocol. Detect interface probes /models. Fetch models and test saves the config, loads models, and validates one usable model.
apiKeyPanel.addMultipleTokensNote: Separate by lines or commas. Tap Add to stage groups before saving.
apiKeyPanel.addTokensNote: Supports one token, line/comma-separated tokens, JSON arrays, or JSON objects with keys/apiKeys/tokens/credentialGroups. Tap Add to stage groups before saving.
apiKeyPanel.modelAliasHelp: Use one model ID per line. Aliases use “display name=model” or “display name -> model”.
apiKeyPanel.capabilityMatrixDescription: Runtime uses these declarations for Responses, WebSocket, compact, embeddings, payload, and model features.
apiKeyPanel.capabilityDependencyHint: Enabling WebSocket or remote compact automatically requires Responses support.

contextPanel.cacheClearedMessage: RAG query cache, request cache, and embedding job state were cleared.
contextPanel.bingKeyPlaceholder: Azure Grounding or compatible search key
contextPanel.confirmPendingMemoriesMessage: After confirmation, these memories can participate in long-term context retrieval.
contextPanel.rejectFilteredPendingMemoriesMessage: Rejected memory candidates are deleted and will not participate in long-term context retrieval.
contextPanel.memoryFilterPlaceholder: Search content, status, or chat ID
contextPanel.knowledgeFilterPlaceholder: Search title, chunk count, or size
contextPanel.knowledgeReadinessWarning: {{failed}} knowledge files failed indexing, and {{empty}} files have no retrievable chunks.
contextPanel.knowledgeEmptyWarning: {{empty}} knowledge files have no retrievable chunks.
contextPanel.knowledgeRecoverySummary: {{failed}} failed files, {{empty}} empty documents, and {{jobs}} failed jobs need attention.

selfTest.knowledgeMiss: The just-written canary document was not found.
selfTest.memoryMiss: The just-written canary memory was not found.
selfTest.extractedMiss: {{count}} extracted, {{hits}} search hits; automatic extraction did not complete end to end.
selfTest.nativeSearchSkip: Provider-native search is selected, so the local search adapter will not send a request.
selfTest.tavilyMissingKey: Tavily mode is enabled, but SecureStore has no key.
selfTest.webNoResults: The request succeeded but returned no web results.

localModel.title: Local models
localModel.priority: Uses the enabled downloaded model first, then bundled APK models, then hash embedding fallback.
localModel.capabilityNotice: One-tap download is currently available for embedding models. Reranker Lite, ColBERT Lite, and Compressor Lite are lightweight local strategies that fall back to lexical signals, token max-sim, or extractive compression.
localModel.mirrorHelp: HuggingFace is tried first. If it fails, the mirror is retried with the same path.
localModel.noDownloadableModels: This version has no downloadable local model manifests.
localModel.capabilityStatusHelp: These capabilities are handled by lightweight local strategies for now. A download action appears only after a verifiable file manifest is available.
localModel.runtimeBoundaryOn: A lightweight strategy is running. The dedicated local model manifest is not available, so no download action is shown.
localModel.runtimeBoundaryOff: This strategy is disabled. The dedicated local model manifest is not available, so no model file can be downloaded or enabled.
localModel.downloadFailedDetail: Details: {{error}}. Temporary files were cleaned up; retry with another network or mirror.
localModel.downloadConfirmMessage: Download {{name}}. Size is about {{size}}. Downloads only start manually.
localModel.deleteConfirmMessage: Delete local files for {{name}}? Bundled APK models are kept.
localModel.placeholderMessage: {{name}} is reserved for a future local capability. Source: {{publisher}}; license: {{license}}. This version does not provide one-tap download yet, so the related RAG flow uses lightweight logic or falls back to basic retrieval.

fallbackStrategies.embedding: When downloadable embedding models are unavailable, IsleMind falls back to hash embedding. It is useful offline, but it is not a semantic vector model.
fallbackStrategies.reranker: Reranker Lite improves result order with lexical overlap, chunk position, and quality signals; no dedicated Cross-Encoder model is loaded.
fallbackStrategies.colbert: ColBERT Lite uses token max-sim for complex-query recall; no dedicated multi-vector ColBERT model is loaded.
fallbackStrategies.compressor: Compressor Lite uses extractive compression that keeps citations and high-relevance sentences; no dedicated LLMLingua model is loaded.

ragDebug.title: RAG debug and evaluation
ragDebug.subtitle: Review recent runs, indexing jobs, fallback reasons, and run the built-in evaluation set.

contextPanel.agenticTechniquesHelp: These toggles control lightweight retrieval strategies and on-demand follow-up retrieval. Lite capabilities are built-in fallbacks, not proof that dedicated local models are downloaded.

updates.androidOnly: APK updates are only available on Android.
updates.noInstallableApk: No installable APK was found in the update manifest or GitHub Releases.
updates.alreadyLatest: Current APK is already up to date: {{version}}.
updates.releaseCheckNetworkFailed: Update check failed because the network or update source is unavailable. {{error}}
updates.releaseCheckRateLimited: Update check failed because GitHub rate-limited the request. Retry later.
updates.releaseManifestInvalid: Update check failed because the update manifest is invalid. {{error}}
updates.cacheUnavailable: App cache directory is unavailable. Download cancelled.
updates.downloadedFileMissing: The APK file was not readable after download. Installation was cancelled.
updates.apkSizeMismatch: APK size verification failed. Expected {{expected}}, got {{actual}}. The cached file was removed.
updates.checksumMismatch: APK SHA-256 verification failed. The cached file was removed and installation was cancelled.
updates.installerOpenedMessage: APK downloaded and the Android installer has opened. Confirm installation in the system dialog.

mcpRuntime.disconnected: Tool unavailable: MCP Server is not connected.
mcpRuntime.explicitHttpOnly: MCP Servers must use an explicit user-configured HTTP(S) address.
mcpRuntime.emptyOutput: MCP tool returned no usable content.

contextImport.pdfNeedsKey: Importing PDF requires an API Key for the current default provider.
contextImport.pdfExtractFailed: PDF text extraction failed. Nothing was written to knowledge.
contextImport.unsupportedFileType: This file type is not supported yet.

error.providerDisabled: The current provider is disabled. Enable it in settings and retry.
error.missingKey: Save an API Key for the current provider in settings first.
error.maxTokensExceeded: Current Max Tokens is {{current}}, exceeding {{model}}'s output limit of {{limit}}. Lower the output length and retry.
error.remoteCompactRequiredFailed: Remote compact is required, but the current provider does not declare support.
error.providerToolSynthesisFailed: I could not turn the tool result into a usable reply, so internal tool output was hidden. Retry, or switch the web search mode and ask again.
error.internalOutputHidden: This reply contained internal tool output, so it was hidden. Please send the question again.

setup.noProvider: No AI provider is available yet.
setup.stepProvider: 1. Open settings and choose a provider.
setup.stepKey: 2. Save an API Key and confirm Base URL/billing mode.
setup.stepModel: 3. Sync models and test the current model.

workflowSave.messageUnavailable: The source message is no longer available.
workflowSave.suggestionUnavailable: The workflow suggestion is no longer available.
workflowSave.missingSkill: No workflow skill payload was available.
workflowSave.payloadTooLarge: Workflow payload exceeds the save limit.
workflowSave.skillIdConflict: A different skill already uses this workflow id.

trace.recoveredContent: A streaming message had no active request. Existing text was preserved and generation was stopped.
trace.recoveredEmpty: Request restored; no text was available to keep.
trace.stopContent: The current streaming request was stopped and generated text was preserved.
trace.contextNoHits: Retrieval ran, but no memory or knowledge matched this turn.
trace.contextFailed: Context retrieval failed and was skipped.
trace.contextNoUserMessage: No user message yet, so context retrieval was skipped.
trace.compactRemoteEligible: Remote compact is eligible for this request.
trace.webNoSources: Search ran, but returned no usable web sources.
trace.webFailed: Web search failed and was skipped.
trace.nativeSearchProviderSide: Provider-native search runs on the model side.
trace.localSearchSkipped: The current search mode does not send local adapter requests.
trace.nativeSearchRequested: Provider-native search/grounding was requested; the reply is marked source-backed only if the provider returns sources.
trace.nativeSearchSkippedForAttachments: Attachments are present, so provider-native search was skipped.
trace.contextPackContent: Kept the latest {{kept}} messages and summarized {{trimmed}} older messages. Budget {{estimated}}/{{budget}} tokens.
trace.flareRevised: Revised the answer with {{count}} supplemental evidence items.
trace.flareFailed: FLARE follow-up retrieval failed, so the first answer was kept.
trace.modelNoFinalText: The model returned no final text; provider summaries or tool events may be in the process panel.
trace.nativeSearchNoSources: Provider-native search returned no displayable web sources. Treat this reply as ordinary model output, not source-backed search evidence.
trace.stepCompletedWithModel: Step completed with the model request.
trace.stepStoppedNoText: The model returned no text, so the step stopped waiting.
trace.nativeSearchFailedWithModel: Model request failed, so provider-native search did not complete.
trace.mcpToolUnavailable: Requested tool is not enabled or connected: {{tool}}
trace.memoryExtractDisabled: Memory is disabled, so long-term memory extraction was skipped.
trace.memoryExtractMissingKey: The current provider has no API Key, so long-term memory extraction was skipped.
trace.memoryExtractRunning: Extracting confirmable long-term memories from recent chat.
trace.memoryExtractNone: Memory extraction ran and found no new long-term memories.
trace.memoryExtractFailed: Memory extraction failed and was skipped.

userError.badAuth: The provider rejected the current key. Check API Key, account permissions, or provider status.
userError.credentialMismatch: The provider key type does not match the endpoint. Check billing mode and Base URL.
userError.modelUnavailable: The current model is unavailable. The model ID may be wrong or your account may lack access.
userError.emptyResponse: The provider returned no readable body. Test the current model, then check Base URL, protocol, and model permissions.
userError.network: Network request failed or timed out. Check network, proxy, or provider address.
userError.timeout: Request timed out. Check network, proxy, or provider address.
userError.rateLimited: Provider rate limit or quota exhausted. Retry later or check billing/subscription.
userError.maxTokens: Output length exceeds the model limit. Lower Max Tokens and retry.
userError.badBaseUrl: Provider URL or request parameters may be incorrect. Check Base URL and model configuration.
userError.providerConformanceBlocked: The selected provider contract does not support this request. Remove unsupported attachments or tools, enable the required capability, or choose a compatible model/provider.

search.noResults: Web search returned no usable results. Check the search provider, API key, endpoint, or try a more specific query.
search.bingEndpointRequired: Bing Web Search API is retired; enter an Azure Grounding or compatible custom search endpoint.

speech.transcriptionNeedsProvider: Configure a provider that supports audio transcription first.

providerTrace.signatureSaved: The provider returned a protocol continuation signature. It was saved safely and the raw signature is hidden.
providerTrace.thoughtSignatureSaved: The provider returned a thoughtSignature for multi-turn continuation. It was saved safely and the raw signature is hidden.
providerTrace.streamFallbackNoReader: This runtime does not expose readable response chunks, so buffered mode is used.
providerTrace.streamBufferedFallback: The provider returned no parseable streaming body. Trying non-streaming fallback.
providerTrace.streamReader: Receiving provider response through ReadableStream chunks.
providerTrace.streamFallbackCompleted: Provider or runtime did not provide chunks, so this turn completed with non-streaming response.
providerTrace.requestRectifiedThinkingSignature: Removed an unreusable thinking signature and retried.
providerTrace.requestRectifiedThinkingBudget: Adjusted the thinking budget to match provider requirements and retried.
providerTrace.requestRectifiedMimoThinkingDisabled: Disabled MiMo thinking parameters for this turn and retried.
providerTrace.requestRectifiedMimoWebSearchRemoved: Removed MiMo web-search parameters for this turn and retried.
providerTrace.requestRectifiedGeneric: Adjusted the request from provider feedback and retried.
providerTrace.runtimeAccessBlocked: Access policy blocked the current model
providerTrace.runtimeRoutePending: Waiting to choose a request route
providerTrace.runtimeRouteBlocked: Request route was blocked by policy
providerTrace.runtimeRouteSelectedWithWarnings: Selected the {{protocol}} request route with compatibility notes
providerTrace.runtimeTransportPending: Waiting to choose a response channel
providerTrace.runtimeTransportHttpForced: Using the {{transport}} response channel from settings
providerTrace.runtimeTransportStreamingDisabled: Using the {{transport}} compatibility channel for this request
providerTrace.runtimeTransportProviderFallback: Provider is not ready for the realtime channel, so {{transport}} is used
providerTrace.runtimeTransportRuntimeFallback: This runtime is not ready for the realtime channel, so {{transport}} is used
providerTrace.runtimePayloadAdjusted: Request parameters prepared with noted warnings
providerTrace.runtimePayloadBlocked: Request parameters did not pass policy checks
providerTrace.runtimeProxyPending: Waiting to apply network proxy policy
providerTrace.runtimeProxyCustom: Sending through a custom proxy or gateway
providerTrace.runtimeProxyInvalid: Proxy settings are unavailable, using direct connection

providerOperation.chooseModelFirst: Choose or enter a model ID first.
providerOperation.emptyModelResponse: The model returned an empty response. Check whether it supports text chat and your account has access.
providerOperation.emptyModels: The provider returned no available models, so the current manual model list was kept.
providerOperation.modelsEndpointUnavailable: This provider does not support automatic model fetching. Maintain the model list manually.
providerOperation.saveTokenGroupFirst: Save at least one token group first.

hosted.azureOpenAIUnsupported: Azure OpenAI requires an Azure resource Base URL under /openai/v1. Legacy deployment URLs and missing resource URLs are not supported yet.
hosted.awsBedrockUnsupported: AWS Bedrock Runtime needs AWS access key credentials, region, and SigV4 InvokeModel routing. Non-streaming chat tests can use JSON or env-style AWS credentials; model-list, streaming, remote compact, and native tools should use Bedrock Mantle or remain planned.
hosted.vertexAIUnsupported: Vertex AI native Gemini paths require Google Cloud auth plus project/location-aware routing. Use the OpenAI-compatible /endpoints/openapi Base URL for partial chat support.
hosted.vertexAIModelListUnsupported: Vertex AI OpenAI-compatible model-list sync is not covered by the current compatibility contract. Maintain the model list manually until Google Cloud docs or live smoke prove a supported /models route.

providerOperation.htmlInsteadJson: {{provider}} returned an HTML page instead of JSON. Check whether Base URL should include /v1, or whether the provider returned a login/proxy error page.
providerOperation.invalidJson: {{label}} is not valid JSON. Response type: {{contentType}}; snippet: {{snippet}}
providerOperation.timeout: Request timed out. Check network, proxy, or provider address.
providerOperation.networkError: Network request failed. Check network, proxy, or provider address.

http.badAuth: {{provider}} rejected the current key. Check API Key, account permissions, or billing mode.
http.modelUnavailable: {{model}} is unavailable. The model ID may be wrong or your account may lack access.
http.modelsEndpointUnavailable: {{provider}} model list endpoint is unavailable. Maintain models manually or check Base URL.
http.rateLimited: {{provider}} is rate limited or out of quota. Retry later or check billing/subscription.
http.maxTokensExceeded: {{provider}} rejected the output length. Lower Max Tokens or switch to a model with a larger output limit.
http.timeout: {{provider}} request timed out. Check network, proxy, or provider address.
http.badBaseUrl: {{provider}} returned 400. Check Base URL, model ID, and request parameters.
http.network: {{provider}} is temporarily unavailable or has a network error. Retry later.
http.htmlResponse: Upstream returned an HTML page. Check the Base URL or reverse-proxy login state.
http.suggestion: Check model access, key quota, and provider status.

providerIssue.invalidBaseUrl: Custom Base URL must be a valid http:// or https:// address.
providerIssue.mimoTpKeyWrongMode: MiMo tp- keys belong to Token Plan. Switch to Token Plan mode and the matching region.
providerIssue.mimoSkKeyWrongMode: MiMo sk- keys belong to metered billing. Switch to metered mode, or use a tp- Token Plan key.
providerIssue.mimoTpKeyPaygUrl: MiMo tp- Token Plan keys cannot call the metered Base URL. Use token-plan-*.xiaomimimo.com/v1.
providerIssue.mimoSkKeyTokenPlanUrl: MiMo sk- metered keys cannot call the Token Plan Base URL. Use https://api.xiaomimimo.com/v1.
providerIssue.mimoTokenPlanCustomUrl: MiMo Token Plan is selected. Custom Base URL should use token-plan-*.xiaomimimo.com/v1.
providerIssue.mimoPaygCustomUrl: MiMo metered billing is selected. Custom Base URL should not point to token-plan-* domains.
providerIssue.openaiProtocolAnthropicUrl: OpenAI-compatible protocol is selected, but Base URL points to an Anthropic-compatible endpoint. Switch protocol or use a /v1 address.
providerIssue.anthropicProtocolUrl: Anthropic-compatible protocol is selected. Base URL should use the /anthropic endpoint.
providerIssue.mimoAnthropicNeedsV1: MiMo Anthropic-compatible endpoint can be /anthropic; the app adds /v1/messages when sending.

providerRegistry.probeSkippedMissing: {{reason}}; site or key is missing, so network probe was not started.
providerRegistry.probeMiss: {{reason}}; network probe did not match, and protocol can still be selected manually.
providerRegistry.jsonNoProviders: No providers were recognized in JSON.
providerRegistry.jsonParseFallback: JSON parsing failed, so text import was used.
providerRegistry.chunkUnrecognized: Block {{index}} has no recognizable provider information.
providerRegistry.providerSkippedByPolicy: {{name}} is blocked by provider access policy and was skipped.
providerRegistry.modelsSkippedByPolicy: {{count}} models for {{name}} were skipped by access policy.

source.deterministic: Rule-based extraction from explicit user statements
